name: comfyui-image-gen
description: Generate images using AI models via a local ComfyUI instance. Automatically handles model setup. After first install, please restart Claude Desktop.

tools.name: generate_illustrated_image
tools.description: Generate an anime/illustration image using the Anima model via ComfyUI

tools.name: generate_realistic_image
tools.description: Generate a realistic/general-purpose image using the Flux 2 Klein model via ComfyUI

tools.name: generate_custom_image
tools.description: Generate an image using a user-provided custom ComfyUI workflow

tools.name: fetch_result
tools.description: Fetch the result of an image generation that is still in progress

anima_artists.title: Anima Artist Styles
anima_artists.description: Comma-separated list of artist styles for the Anima model. The model defaults to the first one. Uses @ prefix (e.g. @cutesexyrobutts, @nyantcha).

comfyui_url.title: ComfyUI URL
comfyui_url.description: URL of your ComfyUI instance (leave default unless you have a custom setup)

comfyui_exe.title: ComfyUI Executable Path (optional)
comfyui_exe.description: Path to your ComfyUI executable if installed in a non-default location. Leave empty for auto-detection.

custom_workflow.title: Custom Workflow Path (optional)
custom_workflow.description: Path to a ComfyUI workflow exported in API format (.json). If provided, this replaces the built-in workflow.
